Introduction
The Compass Group · The Entrepreneur's Coach

Discover Your
True Business Value
— and How to Unlock It

The Compass Group uses this proprietary assessment — built on the Value Acceleration Methodology from Walking to Destiny by Christopher Snider — to calculate your estimated current value, your best-in-class potential, and the exact actions that will close the gap.

01
Financial InputsRevenue, EBITDA & industry to anchor your valuation
02
50-Question AssessmentScore your business across 5 value drivers using a 6-point scale — no middle ground
03
Valuation AnalysisCurrent value vs. best-in-class potential
04
Gap BreakdownHow each driver impacts your value in dollars
05
90-Day Action PlanRanked steps to close your biggest gaps
15–20 minutes to complete 50 questions, 5 value drivers Instant personalized results Printable PDF report
Step 1 of 6 — Financial Baseline

Your Business Financials

These three inputs anchor your valuation. Use your most recent full fiscal year. For EBITDA, use recasted/adjusted EBITDA — this means adding back owner compensation above market rate, personal vehicles, personal travel, one-time legal fees, and other non-recurring expenses. Example: If your tax return shows $300K profit but you paid yourself $250K above what a hired CEO would cost, your recasted EBITDA might be $450K.

Total sales from your most recent fiscal year
Earnings + owner add-backs. Ask your advisor if unsure.
Select the NAICS category that best describes your primary revenue source
Privacy note: This assessment runs entirely in your browser. No financial data is transmitted or stored anywhere. Your results are for your eyes only until you choose to share them with your Compass Group advisor.
